import React, { useEffect, useState,useContext } from "react"; import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom"; import { Footer } from "./Footer"; import Axios from "axios"; import { Navbar } from "./Navbar"; import ProductImage from "./ProductImage"; import ProductInfo from "./ProductInfo"; import CartContext from "./context/CartContext"; export const ProductDetail = (props) => { const { productId,producttitle,productprice } = useParams(); const [Product, setProduct] = useState([]); const {addToCart,abc} = useContext(CartContext) const url = `http://localhost:5000/api/product/products_by_id?id=${productId}&type=single`; useEffect(() => { Axios.get(url).then((response) => { setProduct(response.data[0]); }); }, []); const addtocarthandler =((productId)=>{ addToCart(productId); abc(); }) return ( <>
